scenario.name: SIP REGISTER
scenario.send: REGISTER sip:[remote_ip] SIP/2.0 Via: SIP/2.0/TLS [local_ip]:[local_port];branch=[branch] From: <sip:[field0]@[remote_ip]>;tag=[call_number] To: <sip:[field0]@[remote_ip]> Call-ID: [call_id] CSeq: 1 REGISTER Contact: <sip:[field0]@[local_ip]:[local_port];transport=tls> Max-Forwards: 70 Expires: 3600 Content-Length: 0

REGISTER sip:[remote_ip] SIP/2.0 Via: SIP/2.0/TLS [local_ip]:[local_port];branch=[branch] From: <sip:[field0]@[remote_ip]>;tag=[call_number] To: <sip:[field0]@[remote_ip]> Call-ID: [call_id] CSeq: 2 REGISTER Contact: <sip:[field0]@[local_ip]:[local_port];transport=tls> Max-Forwards: 70 Expires: 3600 [authentication] Content-Length: 0
